title: Create a Blog Post Formatter Using Filters

source.module: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

topicTags: Core Django Fundamentals – Templates & Static Content

content.problemStatement:
In this worked-out example, we'll create a simple blog post formatter using Django templates and filters. We'll use filters to modify the title, content, and publication date of a blog post.

### How does this code work?
In the `blog_post.html` file - you can review the following
- `|title` filter capitalizes each word
- The `|upper` filter converts all letters to uppercase
- The `|date:"F d, Y"` filter formats
   - F = Full month name
   - d = Day with leading zero
   - Y = 4-digit year
- `|truncatewords:20` limits the output to first 20 words

You can run the code and view the webpage at the route - `/blog/`.
